channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned bin, 30th March
item.description:
Abandoned bins filled with something stinking (soil? Kitchen compost?) been sitting on the pavement for weeks now despite reporting it to yeh council already. PLEASE REMOVE IT.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside house number 2(end of Lindfield gardens going towards Arkwright Road), 30th March
item.description:
I am writing to formally report a significant safety hazard regarding overgrown plants originating from House Number 2. The plants have grown across the public pavement, obstructing approximately half of the walkway. More importantly, the plants are extremely sharp and positioned at eye level, posing a severe risk of injury to pedestrians. Due to the high risk of a "sight-threatening" injury, I request that this be inspected and remediated as soon as possible. Thank you for your prompt attention to this health and safety matter.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Lindfield Gardens, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 30th March
item.description:
The street light is not working making the end of the close very dark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roundwood, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned mattress, 30th March
item.description:
Another mattress has been dumped on the side of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Howard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked in EV charging bay continuously for several days, 30th March
item.description:
This car has been parked in this EV charging spot for several days (at least 3 but probably more). As you can see from the 3 green lights on the charger, it is not actively charging so should have been moved so someone else can charge their vehicle.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lampost Light Not Working, 30th March
item.description:
Lampost light is not working What3words: ///slate.kings.trap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Wadhurst Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle is parked badly and been like this for 5 weeks, 30th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been left parked sticking out blocking the road making it single file for over 5 weeks. It has not moved or been touched

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal bollard at crossing point outside post office has been knocked down, 30th March
item.description:
The incident has left a dangerous hole with the jagged metal remains of the bollard sticking up. This may cause a serious injury to children, the elderly, sight impaired and mobility/disabled person.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of rubbish, 30th March
item.description:
Huge amount of rubbish, boxes and pallets on the street, overflowing bins and stretching all the way to the tree.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Osbaldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked grill of drain in road, 30th March
item.description:
Needs clearing to allow rain into the drainage system. Clogged with soil.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crathie Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Western Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster

item.title: Abandoned forest deliveroo bike, 30th March
item.description:
Abandoned forest bike thrown over the railings towards the A 2 Walkway between danson park and A 2 by wellan close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blendon, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 30th March
item.description:
Hi, someone has dumped a load of rubbish on the pavement making it dangerous for pedestrians. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Westbourne Park, 96 Great Western Rd, 30th March

item.title: Graffiti on Newspaper Stand Outside Westbourne Park Station, 30th March
item.description:
Graffiti on Newspaper Stand Outside Westbourne Park Station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Western Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left on drive blowing all over the road into people's front gardens/drive, 30th March
item.description:
153 Green Walk recently moved in. All packing rubbish/plastic and bubble wrap left on the drive. Blowing over the road and over the pavement and on neighbours drives and front gardens as not secured
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Walk, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarp, old sofa and other rubbish immediatly adjacent to River Cray in Jolly Farmers Open Space., 30th March
item.description:
Been there at least a month. Could be leaching toxic fire-retardents into river. Risk items will get thrown into river. Having helped get an old sofa out of the Cray several years ago, I know how horrendously heavy they get when filled with water and how difficult it will be to get out if this happens.. Suggest removed ASAP. Please be aware Bexley's only Rookery is directly opposite on other side of river and nesting, so needs to be done as quickly and quietly as possible. Thanks. .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the corner of Southwark Bridge Road and Belvedere Buildings, 30th March
item.description:
Someone has left a mattress and mattress topper directly by bins they should not be using and it’s blocking the pavement only one person can get past at a time. There is also excessive amounts of bin bags left overflowing from the bins that the bin men did not take on collection day as they would not fit inside the bin. The flytipping has been there for days and the bins for 2 weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-13, Belvedere Buildings, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
